markdown:
#  How does Procore calculate the Over/Under value in Change Events? 
##  Answer 
The Over/Under column on a change event displays the difference between the most firmest revenue value (Latest Price) and the firmest cost value (Latest Cost) for a particular line item. The calculation for the Over/Under column is: (**Latest Price - Latest Cost**) = Over/Under
